takeaways: Market declined (Nifty -3.26%). Look for opportunities in quality stocks with strong fundamentals — dips are for accumulating, not panicking.
Sector rotation: Energy leads (-1.2% month), Realty lags (-14.1%). Consider tilting new allocation toward sectors with strong momentum.
31 watchlist stocks show accumulate signals: BRITANNIA, CUMMINSIND, CDSL, CHOLAFIN, DELHIVERY. Build positions in 2-3 tranches; max 6% per name.
3 watchlist stocks on wait: GODFRYPHLP, DIXON, NTPC. Avoid catching falling knives — wait for trend reversal confirmation.
Macro watch: Crude at $96.51, USD/INR at 93.14. Rising crude or weakening INR can pressure IT/pharma margins short-term but often creates accumulation opportunities in exporters.
Position sizing: Max 6% in any single name. Multi-year horizon — don't chase momentum; buy quality on weakness. Tax-efficient if held > 1 year.
